# Build

## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**id** | Option<**i64**> | The automatically generated unique ID of the build. | [optional]
**task_id** | Option<**i64**> |  | [optional]
**build_type_id** | Option<**String**> | Returns the ID of the corresponding build configuration. To obtain this configuration itself, use the *buildType* property instead. | [optional]
**build_type_internal_id** | Option<**String**> | This property supports the internal infrastructure and is not intented to be used. Use the *buildTypeId* property instead to access the regular build configuration ID. | [optional]
**number** | Option<**String**> | Returns a public build number this build is assigned in its build configuration, *null* if a build is still queued, or *N/A* if a queued build was canceled before it started. | [optional]
**status** | Option<**String**> | Returns whether a build has finished successfully (or is expected to finish so, if still running). Possible values:   * *null* for queued builds.  * *SUCCESS* for builds that have successfully finished or still running without errors.  * *FAILURE* for builds that failed to start or failed during their run.  * *UNKNOWN* for canceled builds. | [optional]
**state** | Option<**State**> | Returns the actual stage of the build's lifecycle: queued, running, or finished. (enum: queued, finished, running, deleted, unknown) | [optional]
**running** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if the build is currently running; otherwise, *false*. | [optional]
**composite** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if this is build is composite; otherwise, *false*.Composite builds aggregate results of multiple child builds. These builds can belong to [composite build configurations](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/composite-build-configuration.html) or can be spawned automatically (for example, to aggregate results of parallel tests). | [optional]
**failed_to_start** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if this build was automatically removed from the building queue (for example, if an error occured or the appointed reviewers failed to [approve the build](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/cloud/build-approval.html) in time); otherwise, *false*.Does not return *true* for manually cancelled builds | [optional]
**personal** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* for [personal builds](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/personal-build.html) and *false* for regular builds. | [optional]
**percentage_complete** | Option<**i32**> | This property is deprecated, see *running-info* property instead. | [optional]
**branch_name** | Option<**String**> | Returns the name of the repository branch whose changes are processed in the current build. This property returns the [logical branch name](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/working-with-feature-branches.html#Logical+Branch+Name) (*main*), not a fully specified VCS branch name (*refs/heads/main*). | [optional]
**default_branch** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if the current build processes changes from the branch specified as default branch in VCS root settings; otherwise, *false*. | [optional]
**unspecified_branch** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if the branch name equals `&lt;unspecified&gt;`; otherwise, *false*. A branch can have this name if TeamCity fails to retrieve a valid branch name. | [optional]
**history** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* for [history builds](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/history-build.html) that started after a build with most recent code changes; otherwise, *false*. | [optional]
**pinned** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if the build is currently [pinned](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/build-actions.html#Pin+Build); otherwise, *false*.Send GET and PUT requests to `/app/rest/builds/<build-locator>/pinInfo` to get the detailed information about pinned builds and manually pin/unpin these builds. | [optional]
**href** | Option<**String**> | Returns the shortened (without the server URL) link to the current build. To obtain the full URL, use the *webUrl* property instead. | [optional]
**web_url** | Option<**String**> | Returns the full web link to access this build. To get a link without the server URL, read the *href* property instead. | [optional]
**queue_position** | Option<**i32**> | Returns the build's position in the building queue. | [optional]
**limited_changes_count** | Option<**i32**> | Returns the number of changes processed in this build. | [optional]
**artifacts_directory** | Option<**String**> | Returns the path to the built-in artifact storage. | [optional]
**links** | Option<[**models::Links**](Links.md)> |  | [optional]
**status_text** | Option<**String**> | Returns the additional information about the finished or running build. Returns nothing if a build is still queued, read the *waitReason* property instead to get the current status of a queued build.In TeamCity UI, this string is displayed next to the build status icon (\"Canceled\", \"Step 3/7\", \"Error while applying patch\", and so on). | [optional]
**build_type** | Option<[**models::BuildType**](BuildType.md)> |  | [optional]
**comment** | Option<[**models::Comment**](Comment.md)> |  | [optional]
**tags** | Option<[**models::Tags**](Tags.md)> |  | [optional]
**pin_info** | Option<[**models::Comment**](Comment.md)> |  | [optional]
**user** | Option<[**models::User**](User.md)> |  | [optional]
**start_estimate** | Option<**String**> | If this build is still queued, this property returns the estimated time (UTC) of an actual build start. | [optional]
**wait_reason** | Option<**String**> | Returns the actual reason why this build remains in build queue. This property returns the most recent wait reason from the *queuedWaitReasons* array. | [optional]
**finish_estimate** | Option<**String**> | Returns the estimated time this build will finish. Returns a value only for queued builds and *null* for those that already run. | [optional]
**delayed_by_build** | Option<[**models::Build**](Build.md)> |  | [optional]
**planned_agent** | Option<[**models::Agent**](Agent.md)> |  | [optional]
**approval_info** | Option<[**models::ApprovalInfo**](ApprovalInfo.md)> |  | [optional]
**running_info** | Option<[**models::ProgressInfo**](ProgressInfo.md)> |  | [optional]
**canceled_info** | Option<[**models::Comment**](Comment.md)> |  | [optional]
**queued_date** | Option<**String**> | Returns the date and time (UTC) when this build was queued. Note that the moment this build actually starts is stored in the different property (*startDate*).. | [optional]
**start_date** | Option<**String**> | Returns the date and time (UTC) of the moment the build actually started. Note that the moment a build was triggered is stored in the *queuedDate* property. | [optional]
**finish_date** | Option<**String**> | Returns the date and time of the moment the build was removed from the queue (finished, failed, or was canceled). The value is in UTC and corresponds to the server timezone. | [optional]

**used_by_other_builds** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if at least one dependent build has [reused this build](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/snapshot-dependencies.html#Suitable+Builds) instead of triggering a new one. | [optional]
**status_change_comment** | Option<[**models::Comment**](Comment.md)> |  | [optional]
**vcs_labels** | Option<[**Vec<models::VcsLabel>**](VcsLabel.md)> | Returns a list of [labels](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/vcs-labeling.html) that tag sources of this particular build. | [optional]
**detached_from_agent** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true*, if running build no longer [occupies a build agent](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/detaching-build-from-agent.html); otherwise, *false*. | [optional]
**finish_on_agent_date** | Option<**String**> | Similar to the *finishDate* property, but adjusts the date and time according to the agent timezone. | [optional]
**customized** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if the build is running with non-default parameter, dependency, and (or) changes settings (for example, reuses the manually selected build or targets the specific changes revision instead of building latest changes); otherwise, *false*. | [optional]
**customization** | Option<[**models::Customizations**](Customizations.md)> |  | [optional]
**changes_collecting_in_progress** | Option<**bool**> | Returns *true* if the build is currently collecting changes from a remote repository; otherwise, *false*. | [optional]
**queued_wait_reasons** | Option<[**models::Properties**](Properties.md)> |  | [optional]
